channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Iran In Talks With Oman For Permanent Hormuz Toll System

media:content.media:description: Asked about the plan, US President Donald Trump rejected it.

item.description: Situated between Iran to its north and Oman to the south, the strait connects the Persian Gulf to the Indian Ocean and normally handles a fifth of the world's oil and liquefied natural gas supplies, as well as other commodities such as aluminium and
item.content:encoded: Situated between Iran to its north and Oman to the south, the strait connects the Persian Gulf to the Indian Ocean and normally handles a fifth of the world's oil and liquefied natural gas supplies, as well as other commodities such as aluminium and

item.title: Meet The Key Allies Of Elon Musk Set To Turn Billionaires After SpaceX IPO

media:content.media:description: Elon Musk's reshaping of SpaceX, xAI and X has yielded a significant financial windfall

item.description: Aside from Musk, the individual with the largest directly held position reported on the company's prospectus is Luke Nosek, a co-founder of PayPal and an early institutional investor in SpaceX.
item.content:encoded: Aside from Musk, the individual with the largest directly held position reported on the company's prospectus is Luke Nosek, a co-founder of PayPal and an early institutional investor in SpaceX.

item.title: A 'Band Of Brothers' Is Running Iran With Mojtaba Khamenei: Report

media:content.media:description: Some men who had some personal connection with Mojtaba Khamenei are running Iran

item.description: Experts point out that their shared backgrounds, careers and ideological outlook are the reasons why neither the war nor the collapse of the government and assassinations of around 50 top political and military leaders could paralyse Tehran.
item.content:encoded: Experts point out that their shared backgrounds, careers and ideological outlook are the reasons why neither the war nor the collapse of the government and assassinations of around 50 top political and military leaders could paralyse Tehran.

item.title: Texas Sues WhatsApp, Meta Over Data Access, Encryption Claims

media:content.media:description: Lawsuit seeks a court order barring Meta and WhatsApp from accessing Texans' WhatsApp messages

item.description: The lawsuit says WhatsApp and Meta falsely assure users that WhatsApp messages are encrypted despite having access to "virtually all" private communications on the messaging app.
item.content:encoded: The lawsuit says WhatsApp and Meta falsely assure users that WhatsApp messages are encrypted despite having access to "virtually all" private communications on the messaging app.

item.title: UN Flags 'Grave Concern' Over Taliban Law Allowing Child Marriage

media:content.media:description: The government rejected the accusations, saying the decree follows Islamic law

item.description: Women and girls face widespread discrimination in Afghanistan, with laws dictating how they must dress and behave. They are banned from secondary school and universities and from most jobs
item.content:encoded: Women and girls face widespread discrimination in Afghanistan, with laws dictating how they must dress and behave. They are banned from secondary school and universities and from most jobs

item.title: "We Can Do Without A Lot Of Drama": EU On Climate Talks At UN In Turkey

media:content.media:description: EU's approach to COP31 is subject of debate among the 27 member states

item.description: European countries were deeply frustrated by last year's COP30 climate conference in Brazil, which produced a watered-down final text that lacked any explicit mention of a fossil-fuel transition.
item.content:encoded: European countries were deeply frustrated by last year's COP30 climate conference in Brazil, which produced a watered-down final text that lacked any explicit mention of a fossil-fuel transition.

item.title: What Is GAESA, A Military Conglomerate At Centre Of US-Cuba Tensions

media:content.media:description: Cuba's leadership rarely talks publicly about GAESA

item.description: GAESA stands for Grupo de Administracion Empresarial - or 'business administration group.' It is a sprawling conglomerate of military-run businesses, widely seen as the island's most profitable and efficient.
item.content:encoded: GAESA stands for Grupo de Administracion Empresarial - or 'business administration group.' It is a sprawling conglomerate of military-run businesses, widely seen as the island's most profitable and efficient.

item.title: Punjab Man Installs CCTV On Highway, Sends Footage Of Army's Movement To Pakistan

media:content.media:description: Baljit Singh, alias Bittu, is a resident of Chakk Dhariwal village

item.description: Baljit Singh, a resident of Pathankot, had installed a CCTV camera at a shop near a bridge on the Pathankot-Jammu stretch of the National Highway-44.
item.content:encoded: Baljit Singh, a resident of Pathankot, had installed a CCTV camera at a shop near a bridge on the Pathankot-Jammu stretch of the National Highway-44.

item.title: "I'll Try To Make It": Trump Says Iran War May Keep Him From Son's Wedding

media:content.media:description: US President Donald Trump and Donald Trump Jr. in Washington DC

item.description: Donald Trump Jr, 48, is set to tie the knot for the second time this weekend, marrying Bettina Anderson in the Bahamas, US media reported.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump Jr, 48, is set to tie the knot for the second time this weekend, marrying Bettina Anderson in the Bahamas, US media reported.

item.title: Mojtaba Khamenei Issues New Uranium Diktat Amid Peace Talks, Trump Responds

media:content.media:description: Trump has said the US was ready to attack Tehran if Iran did not agree to a peace deal

item.description: Israeli officials have told news agency Reuters that Trump has assured Israel that Iran's stockpile of highly enriched uranium, needed to make an atomic weapon, will be sent out of Iran and that any peace deal must include a clause on this.
item.content:encoded: Israeli officials have told news agency Reuters that Trump has assured Israel that Iran's stockpile of highly enriched uranium, needed to make an atomic weapon, will be sent out of Iran and that any peace deal must include a clause on this.

item.title: Over 400 Gaza Flotilla Activists Deported To Turkey From Israel, Sparks Criticism

media:content.media:description: Members of Global Sumud Flotilla headed for Gaza arrested and deported by Israel

item.description: About 420 activists departed Israel on planes bound for Turkey, where they landed Thursday evening in Istanbul.
item.content:encoded: About 420 activists departed Israel on planes bound for Turkey, where they landed Thursday evening in Istanbul.

item.title: "USA, Stop It": Huge Protest At New US Consulate In Greenland

media:content.media:description: People gather to protest on the day of the opening of a new US consulate in Nuuk on Thursday.

item.description: Greenland's Prime Minister Jens-Frederik Nielsen and a series of other politicians said that they had declined invitations to attend the opening of the new diplomatic mission.
item.content:encoded: Greenland's Prime Minister Jens-Frederik Nielsen and a series of other politicians said that they had declined invitations to attend the opening of the new diplomatic mission.

item.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Postpones Highly Anticipated Starship Launch

media:content.media:description: The company said it is now eyeing Friday for another take-off attempt.

item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX postponed the highly anticipated launch of its upgraded Starship megarocket, calling off Thursday's test after multiple countdown stops and starts.
item.content:encoded: Elon Musk's SpaceX postponed the highly anticipated launch of its upgraded Starship megarocket, calling off Thursday's test after multiple countdown stops and starts.

item.title: US, Iran In Intense Indirect Talks For Drafting Final Agreement: Report

media:content.media:description: The report also said that intensive mediation efforts are underway.

item.description: Iran War: According to the report, the two sides are currently exchanging messages and draft texts. An Iranian official earlier told Al Jazeera that negotiators were "very close" to reaching an understanding.
item.content:encoded: Iran War: According to the report, the two sides are currently exchanging messages and draft texts. An Iranian official earlier told Al Jazeera that negotiators were "very close" to reaching an understanding.

item.title: Trump Says Sending 5,000 US Troops To Poland

media:content.media:description: US President Donald Trump said Thursday he was sending 5,000 troops to Poland.

item.description: Trump said the move was based on his relationship with Poland's president Karol Nawrocki, a nationalist ally whom he said he was "proud to endorse" in elections that Nawrocki won last year.
item.content:encoded: Trump said the move was based on his relationship with Poland's president Karol Nawrocki, a nationalist ally whom he said he was "proud to endorse" in elections that Nawrocki won last year.

item.title: Iran Executes Two Men Over Armed Rebellion Charges, Links To 'Separatists'

media:content.media:description: Iran is the world's second-most prolific executioner after China, according to rights groups

item.description: Since the start of the conflict with Israel and the United States in February, Iran has ramped up executions, with many of the convicts hanged over anti-government protests that took place across Iran early this year.
item.content:encoded: Since the start of the conflict with Israel and the United States in February, Iran has ramped up executions, with many of the convicts hanged over anti-government protests that took place across Iran early this year.

item.title: SpaceX's IPO Bonus For Musk Has One Condition: A Million Humans On Mars

media:content.media:description: Elon Musk will do just fine if the IPO goes ahead in the coming weeks as planned. (File)

item.description: Musk's bonus is contingent on SpaceX's stock market value hitting targets ranging from $400 billion to $6 trillion -- along with the company moving a million people to Mars.
item.content:encoded: Musk's bonus is contingent on SpaceX's stock market value hitting targets ranging from $400 billion to $6 trillion -- along with the company moving a million people to Mars.

item.title: "Ridiculous, Unnecessary": Trump Eases Biden-Era Greenhouse Gas Curbs
item.description: Donald Trump on Thursday announced the easing of curbs on a group of powerful greenhouse gases commonly found in refrigerators and air conditioners.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump on Thursday announced the easing of curbs on a group of powerful greenhouse gases commonly found in refrigerators and air conditioners.

item.title: $50 Tickets For 1,000 New Yorkers: Mamdani's World Cup-Worthy FIFA Deal

media:content.media:description: The tickets are currently the cheapest available through FIFA's official sales process

item.description: The tickets are currently the cheapest available through FIFA's official sales process. Fans selected through the ballot will also receive free round-trip bus transport to the stadium.
item.content:encoded: The tickets are currently the cheapest available through FIFA's official sales process. Fans selected through the ballot will also receive free round-trip bus transport to the stadium.

item.title: Displaced By War, Lebanese Grandmother Feeds Thousands Of Fellow Refugees

media:content.media:description: The ongoing war between Israel and Hezbollah displaced over one million.

item.description: The ongoing war between Israel and Hezbollah displaced over one million people in the tiny country during months of cross-border fighting.
item.content:encoded: The ongoing war between Israel and Hezbollah displaced over one million people in the tiny country during months of cross-border fighting.
